signals.title: Quantum Space wins Pentagon contract to develop orbital refueling spacecraft
signals.summary:
The company plans to deliver a fuel-transfer vehicle to the U.S. Space Force by 2028 
 The post  Quantum Space wins Pentagon contract to develop orbital refueling spacecraft  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.summary: The vast majority of data centers globally face either acute risk from climate change events or chronic risk from ongoing climate issues like extreme heat.

signals.summary: Companies rush to miniaturize the technology for marking targets on the battlefield, making it suitable to ride on small unmanned aerial vehicles.

signals.title: India touts new ballistic missile defense prowess after tests
signals.summary: India aims to joint a small club of countries capable of bringing down incoming missiles with technology made domestically.

signals.title: General Atomics awarded US Army contract for extended-range artillery round
signals.summary: During a test last year, the company's projectile hit targets more than 74 miles away after being fired from an M777 howitzer.

signals.title: Russian strategic bomber crashes in Siberia during training exercise
signals.summary: The Soviet-era supersonic bomber has most recently been used by Russia for combat missions in Syria and Ukraine.

signals.title: Iran, US agree to halt war and reopen Hormuz
signals.summary: The memorandum of understanding is scheduled to be officially signed on Friday in Switzerland.

signals.title: Australia forges ahead with 155mm ammo production
signals.summary: The Maryborough factory will commence M795 production by late 2028 at a rate of 15,000 rounds annually.
